summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was invented, no close/fix/merge path is allowed for this job, and security-sensitive linked refs are scoped to central security routing only. Validator-flagged security-sensitive refs #93518, #93526, and #93533 were repaired to exact-ref route_security actions.
